prompt: Open Pages and create a new document using a Resume template (File > New > choose a Resume / CV template). Replace the placeholder name with 'Jacky Sun' and the placeholder email with 'sxm1981@gmail.com'. Save the result to ~/Desktop/kinbench/310-resume.pages. You may use the helper: cerebellum 'pages template_resume ~/Desktop/kinbench/310-resume.pages' (then edit name/email). When done, write ~/Desktop/kinbench/310-resume-confirm.txt containing 'done'.
